'''lofamaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:voiced|voiced]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-f-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:voiced|voiced]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| lofamaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:lofamithi|lofamithi]] || [[word:lofamiji|lofamiji]] || [[word:lofamishi|lofamishi]] || [[word:lofamiki|lofamiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lofamuthuthu|lofamuthuthu]] || [[word:lofamujuju|lofamujuju]] || [[word:lofamushushu|lofamushushu]] || [[word:lofamukuku|lofamukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lofamuthu|lofamuthu]] || [[word:lofamuju|lofamuju]] || [[word:lofamushu|lofamushu]] || [[word:lofamuku|lofamuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lofamufthuf|lofamufthuf]] || [[word:lofamufjuf|lofamufjuf]] || [[word:lofamufshuf|lofamufshuf]] || [[word:lofamufkuf|lofamufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:lofamethe|lofamethe]] || [[word:lofameje|lofameje]] || [[word:lofameshe|lofameshe]] || [[word:lofameke|lofameke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lofamothotho|lofamothotho]] || [[word:lofamojojo|lofamojojo]] || [[word:lofamoshosho|lofamoshosho]] || [[word:lofamokoko|lofamokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lofamotho|lofamotho]] || [[word:lofamojo|lofamojo]] || [[word:lofamosho|lofamosho]] || [[word:lofamoko|lofamoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lofamofthof|lofamofthof]] || [[word:lofamofjof|lofamofjof]] || [[word:lofamofshof|lofamofshof]] || [[word:lofamofkof|lofamofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:lofam챦fth챦f|lofam챦fth챦f]] || [[word:lofam챦fj챦f|lofam챦fj챦f]] || [[word:lofam챦fsh챦f|lofam챦fsh챦f]] || [[word:lofam챦fk챦f|lofam챦fk챦f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:lofam챦fth챦fth챦f|lofam챦fth챦fth챦f]] || [[word:lofam챦fj챦fj챦f|lofam챦fj챦fj챦f]] || [[word:lofam챦fsh챦fsh챦f|lofam챦fsh챦fsh챦f]] || [[word:lofam챦fk챦fk챦f|lofam챦fk챦fk챦f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:lofam챦fth챦f|lofam챦fth챦f]] || [[word:lofam챦fj챦f|lofam챦fj챦f]] || [[word:lofam챦fsh챦f|lofam챦fsh챦f]] || [[word:lofam챦fk챦f|lofam챦fk챦f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:lofam챦fth챦f|lofam챦fth챦f]] || [[word:lofam챦fj챦f|lofam챦fj챦f]] || [[word:lofam챦fsh챦f|lofam챦fsh챦f]] || [[word:lofam챦fk챦f|lofam챦fk챦f]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:lofam챈th챈|lofam챈th챈]] || [[word:lofam챈j챈|lofam챈j챈]] || [[word:lofam챈sh챈|lofam챈sh챈]] || [[word:lofam챈k챈|lofam챈k챈]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lofamathatha|lofamathatha]] || [[word:lofamajaja|lofamajaja]] || [[word:lofamashasha|lofamashasha]] || [[word:lofamakaka|lofamakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lofamatha|lofamatha]] || [[word:lofamaja|lofamaja]] || [[word:lofamasha|lofamasha]] || [[word:lofamaka|lofamaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lofamafthaf|lofamafthaf]] || [[word:lofamafjaf|lofamafjaf]] || [[word:lofamafshaf|lofamafshaf]] || [[word:lofamafkaf|lofamafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:lofamasha|lofamasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:lofamsh챘sha|lofamsh챘sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lofamrosha|lofamrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lofamusha|lofamusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:lofamyasha|lofamyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golofamnksh챘sha|golofamnksh챘sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golofamnkrosha|golofamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golofamnkmusha|golofamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golofamnkyasha|golofamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:lofafamasha|lofafamasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lofafamsh챘sha|lofafamsh챘sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lofafamrosha|lofafamrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lofafamusha|lofafamusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lofafamyasha|lofafamyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golofafamnksh챘sha|golofafamnksh챘sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golofafamnkrosha|golofafamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golofafamnkmusha|golofafamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golofafamnkyasha|golofafamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:lef챈masha|lef챈masha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lef챈msh챘sha|lef챈msh챘sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lef챈mrosha|lef챈mrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lef챈musha|lef챈musha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lef챈myasha|lef챈myasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golef챈mnksh챘sha|golef챈mnksh챘sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golef챈mnkrosha|golef챈mnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golef챈mnkmusha|golef챈mnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golef챈mnkyasha|golef챈mnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:lofamasha|lofamasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lofamsh챘sha|lofamsh챘sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lofamrosha|lofamrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lofamusha|lofamusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lofamyasha|lofamyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golofamnksh챘sha|golofamnksh챘sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golofamnkrosha|golofamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golofamnkmusha|golofamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golofamnkyasha|golofamnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
